Route 1.title: The Imperial Axis · From National Narrative to Local Life
Route 1.description: Walk the line between the grandeur of the state, the majesty of the Forbidden City, and the intimate charm of hutong alleyways to feel the historical depth of Beijing's central axis.

attractions.name: Tiananmen, Forbidden City & Jinshan Park
attractions.description: Imperial axis, symbols of power

attractions.name: Beijing Hutong Light Walk / Cycling
attractions.description: Old Beijing's alleyways, traditional courtyard architecture

Route 2.title: Two Faces of an Empire · Might & Serenity
Route 2.description: Contrast the formidable military genius of the Great Wall with the poetic, man-made paradise of the Summer Palace, witnessing the two extremes of an empire's soul.

attractions.name: The Great Wall at Mutianyu
attractions.description: Majestic mountain scenery, military genius, legendary fortifications

attractions.name: Summer Palace
attractions.description: Imperial garden design, philosophies of harmony

Route 3.title: Dialogue with Heaven · Faith & Philosophy
Route 3.description: Explore the spiritual heart of the capital, from the emperor's sacred rituals at the Temple of Heaven to the vibrant energy of Tibetan Buddhism at the Lama Temple.

attractions.name: Temple of Heaven
attractions.description: Sacred architecture, ancient rituals, royal connection to heaven

attractions.name: Yonghe Temple (Lama Temple)
attractions.description: Tibetan Buddhism, vibrant atmosphere, imperial monastery

Peking Opera & Dinner.description: Traditional melodies, vibrant costumes, and authentic local cuisine

Hanfu Shooting.description: Wearing traditional Hanfu, capturing your moments in a royal landscape

Route 1.title: The Emperor's Eternal Guard · A Journey into Imperial Legend
Route 1.description: Stand before the silent, subterranean legion of China's First Emperor, a UNESCO world wonder. Then, bridge millennia by crafting your own terracotta warrior, connecting with an ancient art form hands-on.

attractions.name: Terracotta Army & Mausoleum Park
attractions.description: First Emperor's subterranean legion, Unparalleled archaeological wonder, A life-sized army for the afterlife

Route 2.title: Heartbeat of the Ancient Capital · A Silk Road City Walk
Route 2.description: Cycle atop the monumental Ming City Wall, tracing the capital's grand perimeter. Then descend into the vibrant, spice-scented chaos of the Muslim Quarter, and end your journey at the serene Giant Wild Goose Pagoda.

attractions.name: Xi'an City Wall
attractions.description: China's grandest urban fortification, Monumental Ming Dynasty ramparts

attractions.name: Big Wild Goose Pagoda
attractions.description: Enduring symbol of Buddhist pilgrimage, Legacy of monk Xuanzang, A landmark of Silk Road cultural exchange

attractions.name: Bell/Drum Towers & Muslim Quarter
attractions.description: Historic heart of the city, Bustling Silk Road marketplace, A vibrant symphony of street food

Tang Dynasty Palace Show.description: Imperial courtly splendor, A lavish Tang-era banquet for the senses

Terracotta Warrior DIY Workshop.description: Hands-on artisan craft, Personal dynastic souvenir, The art of ancient sculpting

Tang Paradise & Everbright City.description: Imperial garden revival, Dazzling nocturnal spectacle, Tang Dynasty's golden age

Route 1.title: Classical Gardens v.s. Modern Metropolis
Route 1.description: Weave a path from ancient treasures and old-world markets to the grand waterfront of The Bund, tracing Shanghai's epic transformation from a classical garden city to a dazzling modern metropolis.

attractions.name: People's Park & Shanghai Museum
attractions.description: Ancient art treasures, an urban oasis

attractions.name: The Bund Citywalk
attractions.description: Iconic architecture, Shanghai skyline

attractions.name: Yu Garden & City God Temple
attractions.description: Classical gardens, local snacks, lively bazaar

Route 2.title: Red History & Art Deco Glamour
Route 2.description: Stroll from the quiet lanes that birthed Red history to a tranquil downtown temple and along elegant, tree-lined boulevards to discover the eclectic and inclusive 'Haipai' spirit of Shanghai.

attractions.name: Site of the First CCP Congress
attractions.description: Modern Chinese history, pivotal landmark

attractions.name: Jing'an Temple & Wukang Road Walk
attractions.description: Golden rooftops amid skyscrapers, historical villas

Route 3.title: Venice of Shanghai
Route 3.description: Escape the city's frantic pace to drift through a living watercolor of ancient canals, where stone bridges arch over serene waters and traditional life unfolds at a timeless rhythm.

attractions.name: Zhujiajiao Water Town
attractions.description: Ancient canals, stone bridges, Ming-Qing architecture

Route 4.title: Disneyland & Fireworks
Route 4.description: Step beyond the everyday into a kingdom where classic tales unfold, futuristic worlds ignite, and spectacular fireworks crown a day of pure wonder.

attractions.name: Shanghai Disneyland
attractions.description: Themed lands, world-class entertainment, nighttime spectacular

Huangpu River Night Cruise.description: Glittering skyline, Bund vs. Puxi dialogue

Hanfu Shooting.description: Wearing traditional Hanfu, capturing your moments in a royal landscape

Zujiajiao Cloth Workshop.description: Hands-on heritage craft, timeless water town charm, your unique keepsake.

Route 1.title: Guangzhou Life
Route 1.description: Trace the legacy of Canton's merchant princes, from the exquisite artistry of their ancestral halls to the colonial echoes of global trade on Shamian Island.

attractions.name: Chen Clan Ancestral Hall & Shamian Island & Yongqing Fang
attractions.description: Lingnan craftsmanship, colonial elegance, revitalized local life

attractions.name: Xiguan Folk Museum & Thirteen-Hongs Museum & Canton Tower
attractions.description: Authentic Cantonese life, maritime trade history, Guangzhou's slender icon

Route 2.title: Guangzhou History
Route 2.description: Walk Guangzhou's historical axis — from its founding myth and a 2,000-year-old royal tomb to its modern republican heart.

attractions.name: Yuexiu Park & Museum of the Nanyue King
attractions.description: Guangzhou's city emblem, royal tomb discovered intact

attractions.name: Sun Yat-sen Memorial & Huiji Old Streets
attractions.description: Legacy of the 'Father of Modern China', historic neighborhoods

Route 3.title: Fun Canyon Thrills
Route 3.description: Challenge your senses walking on glass platforms above a jungle-clad canyon, then race the currents on a thrilling whitewater journey.

attractions.name: Gu Long Gorge Day Trip
attractions.description: Grand waterfalls, a glass bridge & thrilling jungle coaster

Route 4.title: Unlocking the World's Factory
Route 4.description: Guided by local insiders to uncover sourcing secrets and unearth a treasure trove of global goods right at the source.

attractions.name: Wholesale Market Deep Dive
attractions.description: Navigating the heart of 'Made in China', Sourcing secrets from local insiders

Wellness SPA.description: Relax and rejuvenate after a day of adventure

Live-Streaming Hub Visit.description: Inside the live-streaming phenomenon, China's digital retail revolution

Wing Chun Kung Fu.description: A hands-on lesson in the art of close-range combat

Route 1.title: Chongqing 8D City Walk
Route 1.description: Journey from the People's Great Hall, fly across the Yangtze via its iconic cable car, and dive into the tangled, historic alleys of Old Chongqing.

attractions.name: Great Hall & Shancheng Lane
attractions.description: A Temple-of-Heaven-styled palace, a historic cliffside path

attractions.name: Yangtze River Cableway
attractions.description: Glide over the river in the city's 'air bus'

attractions.name: Xiahao Li Old Street
attractions.description: A reborn riverside port, historic alleys with a modern heart

Route 2.title: UNESCO World Natural Heritage
Route 2.description: Venture deep into a UNESCO-listed landscape of colossal sky-high natural bridges and dramatic narrow abysses carved by the raw power of nature.

attractions.name: Wulong Karst
attractions.description: Giant sinkholes, natural bridges & a deep fissure gorge

Route 3.title: UNESCO World Cultural Heritage
Route 3.description: Journey from the divine stone epics of the UNESCO-listed Dazu Grottoes to the worldly flavors and porcelain echoes of Ciqikou.

attractions.name: Dazu Carvings
attractions.description: A UNESCO pinnacle of rock art

attractions.name: Ciqikou Town
attractions.description: Porcelain past, riverside charm, local street food

Route 4.title: Yangtze River Cruise (3D2N)
Route 4.description: Sail in sublime comfort on a world-class inland voyage, where the myth and majesty of the Yangtze River unfold through the breathtaking Three Gorges.

attractions.name: Fengdu Ghost City
attractions.description: Taoist underworld, Supernatural architecture

attractions.name: Wuxia (Witch) Gorge Sailing
attractions.description: Poetic scenery, Mythical peaks, Deep & serene beauty

attractions.name: Three Gorges Dam
attractions.description: World's largest hydro-project

Sichuan Opera Face-Changing.description: A theatrical show featuring the magical art of instantaneous mask-swapping

Route 1.title: The Painter's Scroll · A Yangshuo River & Field Journey
Route 1.description: Drift down the idyllic Yulong River on a bamboo raft, cycle through a living landscape painting of karst peaks and paddy fields, and dive into the vibrant energy of West Street.

attractions.name: Yulong River Bamboo Raft
attractions.description: Serene river journey, Idyllic countryside scenery, Gentle bamboo rafting

attractions.name: Ten-Mile Gallery Cycling
attractions.description: Scenic cycling route, Corridor of karst peaks, Pastoral countryside charm

attractions.name: West Street Stroll
attractions.description: Ancient street, modern energy, East-meets-West culture

Route 2.title: The Grand Panorama · Where the Li River Meets the Sky
Route 2.description: Sail the most iconic stretch of the Li River, capturing the view immortalized on the 20 RMB note, then ascend Xianggong Mountain for the legendary panorama.

attractions.name: Xingping Ancient Town
attractions.description: Iconic 20 RMB banknote view, Historic riverside settlement

attractions.name: Li River Motorized Raft
attractions.description: Classic Li River section, Motorized scenic cruise

attractions.name: Xianggong Hill Climb
attractions.description: Breathtaking Li River panorama, Photographer's classic shot

Route 3.title: Karst Conquest & Cuisine
Route 3.description: Conquer Yangshuo's iconic karst terrain, explore mysterious caves or ascend sheer cliff faces, then master local flavors in a hands-on cooking class.

attractions.name: All-Terrain ATV
attractions.description: Charge across red-dirt ridges and hidden jungle trails

attractions.name: Chinese Cooking Class
attractions.description: Wok-toss your own kung-pao, hand-pull noodles

attractions.name: Karst Cave Exploration / Via Ferrata Climb
attractions.description: Subterranean wonders or cliffside 'iron path' climbing

Route 1.title: Stairway to Heaven · A Vertical Journey to the Sky's Gate
Route 1.description: Ride one of the world's longest cableways to a mountaintop wonderland, walk on air across cliff-hugging glass skywalks, and stand before the majestic Tianmen Cave.

attractions.name: Tianmen Mountain Excursion
attractions.description: World's longest cable car, Natural 'Heaven's Gate' arch, Thrilling glass skywalk

Route 2.title: The Floating Peaks · A Journey into the World of Avatar
Route 2.description: Venture deep into a surreal world of towering sandstone pillars and mist-shrouded canyons that inspired a cinematic universe.

attractions.name: Golden Whip Stream
attractions.description: Peaceful morning walk, serene nature

attractions.name: Yuanjiajie & Tianzi Mountain
attractions.description: 'Avatar' mountains, breathtaking sea of peaks

Route 3.title: Echoes of Old Hunan · From Waterfall Towns to Riverside Lanterns
Route 3.description: Discover a town built upon a waterfall, share in the joy of a Miao long-table banquet, and wander the lantern-lit twilight of Fenghuang's Tuo River.

attractions.name: Furong (Hibiscus) Town
attractions.description: Ancient town built over a waterfall

attractions.name: Phoenix Ancient Town
attractions.description: Charming streets, romantic Tuo River atmosphere

Route 4.title: Vertical Worlds · From Cliffside Dare to Architectural Fantasy
Route 4.description: Challenge a vertical cliff face on a Via Ferrata with breathtaking views, then marvel at the world's tallest Tujia-style stilt building.

attractions.name: Qixingshan Via Ferrata
attractions.description: Heart-pounding vertical climb on a sheer mountain cliff

attractions.name: 72 Strange Towers
attractions.description: The world's tallest Tujia-style stilt building

Charming Xiangxi Show.description: Vibrant ethnic showcase, Legends of West Hunan

Route 1.title: Whispers of the Heartland · A Guizhou Cultural Safari
Route 1.description: Venture beyond the city into the authentic heartland of Guizhou's minority cultures — from Miao silversmiths and Dong drum towers to the emerald karst paradise of Xiaoqikong.

attractions.name: Jiaxiu Tower
attractions.description: A tribute to scholarly pre-eminence, Guiyang's enduring literary symbol

attractions.name: Qingyan Ancient Town
attractions.description: A stone-built military fortress, A perfectly preserved Ming Dynasty town

attractions.name: Shidong Miao Silversmith Village
attractions.description: Myths & legends forged in silver

attractions.name: Zhaoxing Dong Village
attractions.description: China's largest Dong community, Iconic drum towers & 'wind-and-rain' bridges

attractions.name: Xiaoqikong National Park
attractions.description: UNESCO Karst wonderland, Sapphire rivers & cascading waterfalls

Shidong Market.description: Hunt for silver heirlooms by morning; dive into the vibrant chaos of a real Miao market

Zhaoxing Batik Experience.description: Paint with hot wax; unveil your masterpiece in a bath of deep indigo

Guizhou Craft Brewing.description: Learn the brewer's secrets; taste the province's soul in a glass of local craft spirit

Route 1.title: Stairway to Shangri-La · A Yunnan Overland Epic
Route 1.description: An epic overland journey ascending through Yunnan's cultural and natural wonders — from Dali's Erhai Lake and Lijiang's timeless alleys to the spiritual highlands of Shangri-La.

attractions.name: Kunming Old Street
attractions.description: The vibrant pulse of old Kunming

attractions.name: Dali Old Town
attractions.description: Legacy of the ancient Bai Kingdom, Cobblestone alleys against Cangshan mountain

attractions.name: Erhai Lake & Xizhou Town
attractions.description: The mirror of the Cangshan mountains

attractions.name: Lijiang Old Town
attractions.description: UNESCO labyrinth of canals & cobblestones

attractions.name: Tiger Leaping Gorge
attractions.description: One of the world's most profound canyons

attractions.name: Shangri-La & Dukezong
attractions.description: The Tibetan 'City of Moonlight'

attractions.name: Pudacuo National Park
attractions.description: High-altitude Eden of shimmering lakes & virgin forests

Bai Three-Course Tea Ceremony.description: Step into a Bai courtyard; taste life's journey in three cups of tea

Tibetan Thangka Painting Class.description: Grind mineral pigments; channel ancient faith into your own sacred Thangka

Route 1.title: Panda & Poetry · A Chengdu Cultural Escape
Route 1.description: From the shrine of a legendary strategist to the playful pandas and lively tea houses, experience Chengdu's leisurely charm where history, nature, and food converge.

attractions.name: Wuhou Shrine
attractions.description: The sacred shrine of the Three Kingdoms' legendary strategist Zhuge Liang

attractions.name: Chengdu Museum
attractions.description: Modern cultural exhibits in a striking landmark building

attractions.name: Taikoo Li
attractions.description: Sleek modern shopping woven into ancient temple surroundings

attractions.name: Giant Panda Base
attractions.description: See China's national treasure up close in natural habitat

attractions.name: People's Park
attractions.description: Experience Chengdu's famous tea house culture

attractions.name: Kuanzhai Alley
attractions.description: Qing-dynasty courtyards transformed into chic boutiques and eateries

Sichuan Opera Face-Changing.description: A theatrical show featuring the magical art of instantaneous mask-swapping

Chuan Chuan Hotpot.description: Chengdu's signature spicy hotpot on skewers
